Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class Utilities

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.Utilities
public class Utilities extends Object
A utility class providing various helper methods for time conversions, comparisons, file reading, and resource parsing.

  • Field Details

    • SYNTHEA_VERSION

      public static final String SYNTHEA_VERSION
      The version identifier from the current version of Synthea. Pulled from an autogenerated version file.

  • Constructor Details

    • Utilities

      public Utilities()

  • Method Details

    • convertTime

      public static long convertTime(String units, long value)
      Convert a quantity of time in a specified units into milliseconds.
      Parameters:
      units - : "hours", "minutes", "seconds", "days", "weeks", "years", or "months"
      value - : quantity of units
      Returns:
      milliseconds

    • convertTime

      public static long convertTime(String units, double value)
      Convert a quantity of time in a specified units into milliseconds.
      Parameters:
      units - : "hours", "minutes", "seconds", "days", "weeks", "years", or "months"
      value - : quantity of units
      Returns:
      milliseconds

    • convertCalendarYearsToTime

      public static long convertCalendarYearsToTime(int years)
      Convert a calendar year (e.g. 2020) to a Unix timestamp
      Parameters:
      years - The number of calendar years to convert.
      Returns:
      The equivalent time in milliseconds.

    • getYear

      public static int getYear(long time)
      Get the year of a Unix timestamp.
      Parameters:
      time - The simulation timestamp.
      Returns:
      The year extracted from the timestamp.

    • getMonth

      public static int getMonth(long time)
      Get the month of a Unix timestamp.
      Parameters:
      time - The simulation timestamp.
      Returns:
      The month extracted from the timestamp.

    • localDateToTimestamp

      public static long localDateToTimestamp(LocalDate date)
      Convert the given LocalDate into a Unix timestamp. The LocalDate is assumed to be interpreted in the UTC time zone, and a timestamp is created of the start of the day (00:00:00, or 12:00 midnight).
      Parameters:
      date - the local date
      Returns:
      the timestamp

    • timestampToLocalDate

      public static LocalDate timestampToLocalDate(long timestamp)
      Convert the given Unix timestamp into a LocalDate. The timestamp is assumed to be interpreted in the UTC time zone.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - The simulation timestamp.
      Returns:
      The equivalent LocalDate.

    • getAnniversary

      public static long getAnniversary(long date, int anniversary)
      Get the timestamp of the nth anniversary of the supplied timestamp.
      Parameters:
      date - the timestamp
      anniversary - the number of years after
      Returns:
      the anniversary timestamp

    • primitive

      public static Object primitive(com.google.gson.JsonPrimitive p)
      Converts a JsonPrimitive into a primitive Boolean, Double, or String.
      Parameters:
      p - : JsonPrimitive
      Returns:
      Boolean, Double, or String

    • convertRiskToTimestep

      public static double convertRiskToTimestep(double risk, double originalPeriodInMS)
      Calculates 1 - (1-risk)^(currTimeStepInMS/originalPeriodInMS).
      Parameters:
      risk - The risk value to convert.
      originalPeriodInMS - The original period in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      The equivalent timestep in milliseconds.

    • convertRiskToTimestep

      public static double convertRiskToTimestep(double risk, double originalPeriodInMS, double newTimeStepInMS)
      Calculates 1 - (1-risk)^(newTimeStepInMS/originalPeriodInMS).
      Parameters:
      risk - The risk value to convert.
      originalPeriodInMS - The original period in milliseconds.
      newTimeStepInMS - The new timestep in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      The equivalent timestep in milliseconds.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(Object lhs, Object rhs, String operator)
      Compare two objects. lhs and rhs must be of the same type (Number, Boolean, String or Code) Numbers are converted to double prior to comparison. Supported operators are: <, <=, ==, >=, >, !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side object.
      rhs - The right-hand side object.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(Double lhs, Double rhs, String operator)
      Compare two Doubles. Supported operators are: <, <=, ==, >=, >, !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side Double value.
      rhs - The right-hand side Double value.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(Boolean lhs, Boolean rhs, String operator)
      Compare two Booleans. Supported operators are: <, <=, ==, >=, >, !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side Boolean value.
      rhs - The right-hand side Boolean value.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(String lhs, String rhs, String operator)
      Compare two Strings. Supported operators are: <, <=, ==, >=, >, !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side String value.
      rhs - The right-hand side String value.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(Integer lhs, Integer rhs, String operator)
      Compare two Integers. Supported operators are: <, <=, ==, >=, >, !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side Integer value.
      rhs - The right-hand side Integer value.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • compare

      public static boolean compare(HealthRecord.Code lhs, HealthRecord.Code rhs, String operator)
      Compare two Codes. Supported operators are: !=, is nil, is not nil. Only lhs is checked for is nil and is not nil.
      Parameters:
      lhs - The left-hand side Code object.
      rhs - The right-hand side Code object.
      operator - The comparison operator.
      Returns:
      True if the comparison is valid, false otherwise.

    • parseDateRange

      public static org.apache.commons.lang3.Range<Long> parseDateRange(String range) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Parse a range of Synthea timestamps (milliseconds since the epoch) from a String. The string can be in one of two formats:

      "milliseconds start-milliseconds end" example: "1599264000000-1627948800000" or "ISO date start-ISO date end" example: "2020-09-05-2021-08-03"

      If using the ISO date format, the time range will be from the start of the day at the beginning of the range until the end of the day for the last day of the range.

      Parameters:
      range - String containing the range
      Returns:
      A Range with the min and max set to Synthea timestamps, longs containing milliseconds since the epoch
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the string is not in one of the expected formats

    • readResource

      public static final String readResource(String filename) throws IOException
      Read the entire contents of a file in resources into a String.
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the file, relative to src/main/resources.
      Returns:
      The entire text contents of the file.
      Throws:
      IOException - if any error occurs reading the file

    • readResource

      public static final String readResource(String filename, boolean stripBOM, boolean allowFreePath) throws IOException
      Read the entire contents of a file into a String.
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the file.
      stripBOM - Whether or not to check for and strip a BOM -- see readResourceAndStripBOM(String) for more info
      allowFreePath - If false, the file must be within src/main/resources. If true, the file may be anywhere on the filesystem.
      Returns:
      The entire text contents of the file.
      Throws:
      IOException - if any error occurs reading the file

    • readResourceOrPath

      public static final String readResourceOrPath(String filename) throws IOException
      Read the entire contents of a file into a String. The file may be relative to src/main/resources or anywhere on the filesystem.
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the files.
      Returns:
      The entire text contents of the file.
      Throws:
      IOException - if any error occurs reading the file

    • readResourceAndStripBOM

      public static final String readResourceAndStripBOM(String filename) throws IOException
      Read the entire contents of a file in resources into a String and strip the BOM if present. This method is intended for use when reading CSV files that may have been created by spreadsheet programs that sometimes automatically add a BOM though it could also be used for any other type of file that may optionally include a BOM.
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the file, relative to src/main/resources.
      Returns:
      The entire text contents of the file minus the leading BOM if present.
      Throws:
      IOException - if any error occurs reading the file

    • getGson

      public static com.google.gson.Gson getGson()
      Get a Gson object, preconfigured to load the GMF modules into classes.
      Returns:
      Gson object to unmarshal GMF JSON into objects

    • randomDicomUid

      public static String randomDicomUid(RandomNumberGenerator random, long time, int seriesNo, int instanceNo)
      Generate a random DICOM UID to uniquely identify an ImagingStudy, Series, or Instance. Optionally add series and/or instance numbers to the UID to enhance its uniqueness. Pass 0 for the series/instance number to omit it from the UID.
      Parameters:
      random - The random number generator.
      time - The simulation time.
      seriesNo - The series number.
      instanceNo - The instance number.
      Returns:
      a String DICOM UID

    • strToObject

      public static Object strToObject(Class<?> clazz, String value)
      Utility function to convert from string to a base Java object type.
      Parameters:
      clazz - type to convert to
      value - string value to convert
      Returns:
      converted value

    • walkAllModules

      public static void walkAllModules(BiConsumer<Path,Path> action) throws Exception
      Walk the directory structure of the modules, and apply the given function for every module.
      Parameters:
      action - Action to apply for every module. Function signature is (topLevelModulesFolderPath, currentModulePath) -> {...}
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs while walking the directory structure.

    • walkAllModules

      public static void walkAllModules(Path modulesPath, Consumer<Path> action) throws Exception
      Walk the directory structure of the modules starting at the given location, and apply the given function for every module underneath.
      Parameters:
      modulesPath - The starting path of the modules.
      action - Action to apply for every module. Function signature is (currentModulePath) -> {...}
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs while walking the directory structure.

    • cleanMap

      public static Map cleanMap(Map input)
      Iterate through a Map and remove any entries where there is a key, but the value is null. This method modifies the input Map.
      Parameters:
      input - The Map to clean
      Returns:
      a null-free Map

    • enableReadingURIFromJar

      public static void enableReadingURIFromJar(URI uri) throws IOException
      Enable reading the given URI from within a JAR file. For example, for command-line args which may refer to internal or external paths. Note that it's not always possible to know when a user-provided path is within a JAR file, so this method should be called if it is possible the path refers to an internal location.
      Parameters:
      uri - URI to be accessed.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while enabling reading from the JAR file.

    • parseYamlToResources

      public static <T extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource> List<T> parseYamlToResources(List<Map<String,Object>> yaml, Class<T> resourceClass) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Helper method to parse FHIR resources from YAML. This is a workaround since the FHIR model classes don't work with our YAML parser.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Resource type contained in the YAML
      Parameters:
      yaml - List of pre-parsed YAML as Map<String, Object>
      resourceClass - Specific resource class, must not be Resource
      Returns:
      List of parsed resources
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - (should never happen)
